title: Creamy Aerated Peruvian Rice Paella
description: Rich, aerated Peruvian dish featuring cilantro leaves and nuka-pickle. Suitable for a lazy Sunday.

ingredients.name: Peruvian Long Grain Rice
ingredients.notes: medium-grain rice is ideal for paella

ingredients.name: Cilantro Leaves
ingredients.notes: fresh cilantro for garnish and added flavor

ingredients.name: Nuka-Pickle (Kimchi) Pieces
ingredients.notes: store-bought or homemade kimchi works well

ingredients.name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: used to heat the paella pan

instructions: Heat the paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the olive oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the Peruvian rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the bone broth, smoked paprika, kosher salt, and black pepper.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the nuka-pickle pieces and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in the unsalted butter until melted and fully incorporated.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes.
Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves before serving.
